name: Instadicey
brief:
Instadicey is a simplified Instagram-style social media application built with ASP.NET Core Web API, React, and PostgreSQL. The project focuses primarily on backend architecture, implementing JWT-based authentication, REST APIs for posts and interactions, and containerized deployment using Docker Compose.

Users can create accounts, post photos, like posts, and explore the platform through a guest mode without signing up. The frontend serves as a functional interface to demonstrate the backend systems and application features.

name: Egypt Beatbox Official Website
brief:
I developed the official website for Egypt Beatbox, designed as a central hub for the beatbox community and its events. The platform allows visitors to stay updated on upcoming events, explore lineups, watch recent performances, and purchase tickets directly through the site.

The system includes a full ticketing workflow where users receive a unique QR code for event entry. I also built a custom admin dashboard for organizers to manage events, track ticket sales, and scan QR codes at the entrance to quickly verify tickets and grant access.

name: AcademIQ
brief:
This app streamlines communication between teachers and parents while supporting both online and in-center learning. Built with ASP.NET Core for the backend and Flutter for the mobile frontend, it uses PostgreSQL and is deployed on Render.

The platform allows teachers to track attendance using student QR codes, conduct online exams with grades instantly sent to parents, and send automated check-in notifications via WhatsApp or Telegram. It supports multiple roles — teacher, student, assistant, and parent — with secure role-based access.

The system also includes multi-tenancy support, allowing multiple tutoring centers to use the platform independently while managing their own students, content, and data.

name: Interactive Birthday Website
brief:
A creative and interactive website built as a personalized birthday gift. The site includes custom UI elements, animations, and themed sections inspired by my friend's interests such as cats, nail art, and gaming.

The goal of the project was to design a fun and memorable user experience while experimenting with modern front-end development techniques, responsive design, and interactive components.

name: News Website
brief:
A modern news platform built with React and hosted on Vercel, using Firebase for backend services including Authentication, Cloud Firestore, and Storage. The platform delivers real-time news updates across multiple categories while ensuring secure access and efficient media management.

Writers can publish and tag articles, while readers can browse by category, search topics, view featured news, comment on posts, and share content. An integrated admin dashboard allows administrators to manage articles, users, and categories, creating a streamlined experience for both journalists and readers.
